parameters.functionCode: const org='OpenSIN-AI'; const token=.GITHUB_TOKEN||process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN; const repos=[]; for(let p=1;p<=10;p++){const r=await fetch('https://api.github.com/orgs/'+org+'/repos?per_page=100&page='+p+'&type=all',{headers:{Authorization:'Bearer '+token}}); const d=await r.json(); if(!Array.isArray(d)||d.length===0)break; repos.push(...d.map(x=>({owner:org,repo:x.name}))); if(d.length<100)break} return[{json:{repos,total:repos.length}}];
const repos=.first().json.repos; const tasks=[]; for(const r of repos) tasks.push({json:{...r,governance_path:'governance/repo-governance.json'}}); return tasks;
